caption: A person's hands are seen opening a dark blue packaging box labeled "CLEARLY AUTHENTIC" in white and red text. As the person lifts the top flap of the box, they reveal a protective plastic case containing a sports trading card. The scene takes place on a black surface with a white background. In the bottom right corner of each frame, a small inset video shows a man wearing a black baseball cap and a black shirt, sitting in front of a background with a "Jaspy's Casebreaks" logo. Large red and white text reading "JASPYS CASEBREAKS" is overlaid across the bottom of the main image. As the sequence progresses, the person fully removes the card case from the box and holds it upright, displaying the card inside. The "CLEARLY AUTHENTIC" branding remains visible on the open box throughout the process.
